data.current_description: List agents by verification status. This is a public, rate-limited endpoint that does not require authentication.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve agents filtered by verification status
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of agents filtered by verification status. Accepts optional parameters for filtering and pagination. Returns an AgentsListResponse containing agent objects and pagination metadata. This is a public, rate-limited endpoint that does not require authentication.

data.current_description: Get a single agent by its ID. This is a public, rate-limited endpoint.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific agent by identifier
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single agent object by its unique ID. Requires the agent ID as a path parameter. Returns the complete Agent object containing agent metadata, capabilities, and configuration. This is a public, rate-limited endpoint that does not require authentication.
